title: Angular Blog
description: A Sanity-powered blog built with Angular and visual editing.

title: Getting Started with Sanity
excerpt: Welcome to your new Angular + Sanity blog starter.

children.text: Welcome to your new Sanity-powered site. This starter uses Angular SSR with Presentation tool visual editing.

title: Working with Portable Text
excerpt: Render rich content from Sanity in Angular.

children.text: Portable Text gives you full control over how structured content renders on any platform.

title: Visual Editing with Presentation
excerpt: Preview and edit content side-by-side in Studio.

children.text: Open the Presentation tool in Studio to see live preview and click-to-edit overlays on your Angular blog.
